query:
INSERT INTO events
                (kind, claim_id, check_index, check_digest, verdict,
                 evidence, "commit", store, producer, reported_at, dedup_run)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON CONFLICT (dedup_run, claim_id, check_digest) DO NOTHING
            RETURNING seq AS "seq!: i64"
